title: alangium uniloculare
intro: Alangium uniloculare, also known as the one-fruited alangium or one-fruited thorny cherry, is a plant species belonging to the family Alangiaceae. It is traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Alangium uniloculare include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Alangium uniloculare is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine, highlighting its potential as a valuable herbal resource.
